response:
Yes, both Tionne Watkins and Park So-yeon have been members of girl groups.

According to the context:
1.  **Tionne Watkins** (stage name T-Boz) is described as a member of the American girl group **TLC**, which she joined in 1990.
2.  **Park So-yeon** is described as a former member of the South Korean girl group **T-ara**.
